item.title: Six congressional primaries that explain where the country is headed
item.description: A 21st-century-record number of seats are opening, and races will be raucous and crowded, reflecting both parties’ ideological, stylistic and generati...

item.title: Trump claims victory on affordability as public anxieties persist
item.description: Advisers had been encouraging the president to sound more empathetic toward struggling Americans. But as some bright spots emerge, the messaging has s...

item.title: Rubio says U.S., Europe ‘belong together,’ despite rifts over Trump policies
item.description: While some saw the remarks as reassuring, key European leaders renewed calls for more independence from the U.S. amid tensions over issues like Greenl...

item.title: Golfers sue Trump administration over public course takeover in D.C.
item.description: Some area golfers say the president’s ambitions for East Potomac Golf Links could put low-cost entry points to the game out of reach.

item.title: Republicans see a big opportunity in crowded Democratic primaries
item.description: In several states and swing districts, House Democrats have nomination contests that could prove harmful.
